iotwireless.fuotatask.AssociateMulticast.Description: The ID of the multicast group to associate with a FUOTA task.

iotwireless.fuotatask.AssociateWirelessD.Description: The ID of the wireless device to associate with a multicast group.

iotwireless.fuotatask.Description.Description: The description of the new resource.

iotwireless.fuotatask.DisassociateMultic.Description: The ID of the multicast group to disassociate from a FUOTA task.

iotwireless.fuotatask.DisassociateWirele.Description: The ID of the wireless device to disassociate from a FUOTA task.

iotwireless.fuotatask.FirmwareUpdateImag.Description: The S3 URI points to a firmware update image that is to be used with a FUOTA task.

iotwireless.fuotatask.FirmwareUpdateRole.Description: The firmware update role that is to be used with a FUOTA task.

iotwireless.fuotatask.LoRaWAN.Description: The LoRaWAN information used with a FUOTA task.

iotwireless.fuotatask.Name.Description: The name of a FUOTA task.

iotwireless.fuotatask.Tags.Description: The tags are an array of key-value pairs to attach to the specified resource. Tags can have a minimum of 0 and a maximum of 50 items.
